error.no_devices_selected: At least one device must be selected.

home.title: Select Home
home.description: Your account has multiple homes. Select the home you want to set up.

device.title: Select Devices
device.description: Choose which devices to import into Home Assistant. At least one device must be selected.

reconfigure_home.title: Select Home
reconfigure_home.description: Your account has multiple homes. Select the home you want to use.

reconfigure_device.title: Select Devices
reconfigure_device.description: Choose which devices to import into Home Assistant. At least one device must be selected.

reconfigure_required.title: Phyn reconfiguration required
reconfigure_required.description: Your Phyn account has multiple homes but no home has been selected. Go to Settings → Devices & Services → Phyn and click **Reconfigure** to choose which home to use.

init.title: Phyn Alert Options
init.description: Choose which alert types should be suppressed and never fire a Home Assistant event.
